access_token.description: Illumina BaseSpace access token, sent as the x-access-token header. Never logged.

base_url.description: BaseSpace API domain, e.g. https://api.basespace.illumina.com or a regional domain such as https://euw2.sh.basespace.illumina.com. BaseSpace is domain-scoped with no single fixed default, so this is required (matches legacy's base_url-or-domain requirement).

user.description: BaseSpace user id or 'current' (the authenticated user) that every stream's user-scoped path is read from.

page_size.description: Page size for the Limit query parameter (1-1000).
